name: Atlassian Corp
business: Atlassian provides team collaboration software that enables organizations to connect all teams through a system of work. Its portfolio includes apps, AI agents, and Collections built on the Atlassian Cloud Platform, delivering solutions for software teams, IT operations, leadership, and business teams. The company serves over 300,000 customers worldwide, including more than 80% of the Fortune 500, across over 200 countries.

exposures.sentence: Rovo is Atlassian's advanced AI offering, aimed at enhancing teamwork by assisting teams in quickly locating the right information, understanding it deeply, and taking action using specialized out-of-the-box or custom-tailored agents.
Guard, an app for detecting and responding to security threats across the organization.
